response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for 'The Wolf That Fell in Love with Little Red Riding Hood'. Subtitled all dialogue and vocal music. Discarded unused lyrics from the Reference JSON as the video contains a different portion or ends early. Confirmed all timestamps tightly wrap vocal audio. Split long sentences to maintain readability and character limits.

subtitles.original: I should go through the forest next.
subtitles.english: I should go through the forest next.

subtitles.original: Oh no! What happened to you, oh mighty dragon?
subtitles.english: Oh no! What happened to you, oh mighty dragon?

subtitles.original: ピンクの巨獣にやられた
subtitles.english: I was beaten by a pink giant beast.

subtitles.original: 今は力が入らん
subtitles.english: I have no strength right now.

subtitles.original: 巣も破壊されてしまった
subtitles.english: My nest has also been destroyed.

subtitles.original: Oh no, that is bad!
subtitles.english: Oh no, that is bad!

subtitles.original: I can help you recover if you can take me...
subtitles.english: I can help you recover if you can take me...

subtitles.original: ...straight to the giant monster in exchange.
subtitles.english: ...straight to the giant monster in exchange.

subtitles.original: 任せておけ
subtitles.english: Leave it to me.

subtitles.original: おおかみは赤ずきんに恋をした
subtitles.english: The Wolf That Fell in Love with Little Red Riding Hood

subtitles.original: 偶然からはじまる
subtitles.english: It starts by chance,

subtitles.original: 必然の一場面
subtitles.english: an inevitable scene...

subtitles.original: 遠くに見えたのは
subtitles.english: Far away, what I saw

subtitles.original: 揺れる赤色
subtitles.english: was a swaying red color.

subtitles.original: 不思議な森の奥で
subtitles.english: Deep in the mysterious forest,

subtitles.original: 見つけた黒い影と
subtitles.english: I found a black shadow...

subtitles.original: 何かが始まる予感
subtitles.english: and a premonition of something starting.

subtitles.original: 怖くて逃げ出した
subtitles.english: I ran away in fear.

subtitles.original: 「出会い」は　「終着」へ続くシナリオ
subtitles.english: Our "encounter" is a scenario leading to the "end"...

subtitles.original: だからわざと遠回りをした
subtitles.english: so I took the long way around on purpose.

subtitles.original: 会いたいなんて　触れたいなんて
subtitles.english: I don't think about wanting to meet or touch...

subtitles.original: 話したいなんて思わない
subtitles.english: or wanting to talk to you.

subtitles.original: かよわい君と　鋭い僕が
subtitles.english: Fragile you and sharp me...

subtitles.original: 出会う　それが終わりさ
subtitles.english: meeting... that is the end.

subtitles.original: 残酷だって　罵ったって　運命は変わらない
subtitles.english: Even if you curse it as cruel, fate will not change.

subtitles.original: ああ、どうして君が？　どうして僕が？
subtitles.english: Ah, why are you...? Why am I...?

subtitles.original: おおかみと赤ずきんなんだ
subtitles.english: A wolf and Little Red Riding Hood?

subtitles.original: きっと君は今日も
subtitles.english: Surely you will

subtitles.original: この道を訪れる
subtitles.english: visit this path again today.

subtitles.original: そして僕は今日も　そっと見守るしかできない
subtitles.english: And I can only watch over you quietly again today.

subtitles.original: 君はあの木の先で
subtitles.english: You're hiding beyond that tree

subtitles.original: いつも通り隠れてる
subtitles.english: as usual.

subtitles.original: 僕は気づかぬふりしたまま　通り過ぎた
subtitles.english: I passed by, pretending not to notice.

subtitles.original: 視線は　絡まない
subtitles.english: Our eyes don't meet,

subtitles.original: 声は　届かない
subtitles.english: our voices don't reach...

subtitles.original: ため息だけが　虚しく重なる
subtitles.english: only sighs pile up in vain.

subtitles.original: 会いたくたって　触れたくたって　話せなくたっていいから
subtitles.english: Even if I want to meet or touch you, it's okay...

subtitles.original: 頼りない君と　ぎこちない僕が　そこにいるだけでいいんだ
subtitles.english: as long as helpless you and awkward me are just there.

subtitles.original: これが恋だって言わないなら　言葉なんてなくていい
subtitles.english: If you won't say this is love, then words aren't needed.

subtitles.original: 考えたって　考えたって　エンディングは変わらない
subtitles.english: No matter how I think about it, the ending won't change.

subtitles.original: 会いたかったんだ　触れたかったんだ
subtitles.english: I wanted to meet you, I wanted to touch you,

subtitles.original: 話したかった　本当は
subtitles.english: I wanted to talk, honestly.

subtitles.original: かわいい君と　優しい僕が
subtitles.english: An end where cute you and kind me...

subtitles.original: 出会い　結ばれるエンド
subtitles.english: meet and are joined together.

subtitles.original: 何回だって　何回だって　神様に願ったよ
subtitles.english: Many times, so many times, I prayed to God.

subtitles.original: でも悲しいくらい　悲しいくらい　おおかみと赤ずきんなんだ
subtitles.english: But sadly, so sadly, we are a wolf and Red Riding Hood.

subtitles.original: 泣いてる君を　慰めたくて　伸ばした腕が震える
subtitles.english: Wanting to comfort crying you, my outstretched arm trembles.

subtitles.original: 愛しているよ　抱きしめたいよ　だけど、できないんだよ
subtitles.english: I love you, I want to hold you, but... I can't.

subtitles.original: どうあがいたって　どう願ったって　爪も牙も消えない
subtitles.english: No matter how I struggle, my claws and fangs won't vanish.

subtitles.original: だからただ待ってるよ　君の涙が止むまで
subtitles.english: So I'll just wait, until your tears stop,

subtitles.original: あの木の先で
subtitles.english: beyond that tree...

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: Forever.

subtitles.original: Ah, here we go!
subtitles.english: Ah, here we go!

subtitles.original: If you eat this, you can recover super quick!
subtitles.english: If you eat this, you can recover super quick!

subtitles.original: 感謝する
subtitles.english: I'm grateful.

subtitles.original: よし。完全回復だ
subtitles.english: Good. A full recovery.

subtitles.original: 今すぐ怪獣の元へ案内しよう
subtitles.english: I'll guide you to the monster's place right now.

subtitles.original: Okay, let's go!
subtitles.english: Okay, let's go!

subtitles.original: FLY HIGH!!
subtitles.english: FLY HIGH!!

subtitles.original: 汗と血と涙で...
subtitles.english: Through sweat, blood, and tears...
